title: Spec / meta
description: Administrative metadata for a client project spec. One file per project at spec/meta.yaml.

schema_version.description: Spec schema version this file targets (semver, e.g. "1.0").

project_id.description: Stable, kebab-case project identifier. Used as directory name under clients/, systemd instance name, git repo name.

client_name.description: Human-readable client name as used in correspondence.

last_updated.description: When the spec was last edited (ISO-8601).

archetype.description: Detected or chosen archetype. Drives intake question priorities and stack defaults. Use "other" only when no archetype clearly fits — avoid for V1.

language.description: Primary content language, BCP-47 short form (e.g. "cs", "cs-CZ", "en-GB").

lock_status.description: Spec lifecycle stage. Factory only consumes specs at "approved" or "locked". See ADR-0003.

intake_journal.description: Relative path to the intake-journal.md audit trail. Defaults to ../intake-journal.md.

notes.description: Free-form notes that don't fit other spec files.
